testcase.name: test_delete_active_incident_returns_409
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_step10_12_abschnitte_betten.py:155: in test_delete_active_incident_returns_409 assert d.status_code == 409, f"expected 409, got {d.status_code}: {d.text}" E AssertionError: expected 409, got 204: E assert 204 == 409 E + where 204 = <Response [204]>.status_code
